source_experience.topic: colorectal-cancer AI lecture GPT-image-2 full-slide experiment

prompt.primary_request: Create a complete 16:9 PPT slide page image in Chinese, full page, as one single finished lecture slide, not separate elements.
prompt.exact_main_title: 从肠癌闭环看医疗 AI 的真正起点
prompt.content_structure: Full page layout on a white dotted paper background. Left side shows a simple hand-drawn colon cancer care loop with four large nodes: 筛查, 诊断, 治疗, 随访. A thick black arrow leads to the right-side judgement board: 先闭环, 再智能. Add one bottom tape note: 讲课先抓住一个真实临床闭环. Keep all labels large and short.
prompt.style: white dotted notebook paper background, bold black sketch outlines, pastel marker blocks, hand-drawn arrows, sticker tape, small medical icons, large readable Chinese title, few short labels.
prompt.avoid: dark futuristic console, cyberpunk dashboard, glassmorphism, photo collage, 3D dashboard, dense data table, excessive gradient, logo watermark, screenshot collage, English-heavy labels, tiny unreadable paragraphs, isolated icon sets, separate components.

prompt.primary_request: Create a complete 16:9 PPT slide page image in Chinese, full page, as one single finished lecture slide, not separate elements.
prompt.exact_main_title: 医疗 AI 要先接住临床问题
prompt.content_structure: Draw a full-page concept map. Center has a large rounded rectangle labeled 临床问题. Three pastel branches connect to 症状线索, 检查证据, 治疗决策. A doctor handoff gate sits near the treatment branch with a small red mark labeled 高风险人工接管. Bottom callout: 智能体服务判断链, 不是替代医生.
prompt.style: white dotted notebook paper background, bold black sketch outlines, pastel marker blocks, hand-drawn arrows, sticker tape, small medical icons, large readable Chinese title, few short labels.
prompt.avoid: dark futuristic console, cyberpunk dashboard, glassmorphism, photo collage, 3D dashboard, dense data table, excessive gradient, logo watermark, screenshot collage, English-heavy labels, tiny unreadable paragraphs, isolated icon sets, separate components.

prompt.primary_request: Create a complete 16:9 PPT slide page image in Chinese, full page, as one single finished lecture slide, not separate elements.
prompt.exact_main_title: 医疗元智能体平台由四层组成
prompt.content_structure: Use a full-page stacked architecture diagram. Bottom layer: 共享底座. Middle cards: 医学知识, 工具调用, 任务编排. Top layer: 专病智能体. Use thick arrows upward and a side tape note: 平台负责复制, 专病负责落地. Add small system icons, but keep the page clean and readable.
prompt.style: white dotted notebook paper background, bold black sketch outlines, pastel marker blocks, hand-drawn arrows, sticker tape, small medical and system icons, large readable Chinese title, few short labels.
prompt.avoid: dark futuristic console, cyberpunk dashboard, glassmorphism, photo collage, 3D dashboard, dense data table, excessive gradient, logo watermark, screenshot collage, English-heavy labels, tiny unreadable paragraphs, isolated icon sets, separate components.

prompt.primary_request: Create a complete 16:9 PPT slide page image in Chinese, full page, as one single finished lecture slide, not separate elements.
prompt.exact_main_title: 换规则包, 不重写平台核心
prompt.content_structure: Draw a full-slide plug-in diagram. A stable base labeled 平台核心 sits at the bottom. Three removable cartridges above it are 肠癌规则包, 糖尿病规则包, IBD规则包. Each cartridge has only three short tags: 指南, 指标, 禁忌. Add a red boundary label: 不能把肠癌模型直接搬到其他疾病.
prompt.style: white dotted notebook paper background, bold black sketch outlines, pastel marker blocks, hand-drawn arrows, sticker tape, small medical/system icons, large readable Chinese title, few short labels.
prompt.avoid: dark futuristic console, cyberpunk dashboard, glassmorphism, photo collage, 3D dashboard, dense data table, excessive gradient, logo watermark, screenshot collage, English-heavy labels, tiny unreadable paragraphs, isolated icon sets, separate components.

prompt.primary_request: Create a complete 16:9 PPT slide page image in Chinese, full page, as one single finished lecture slide, not separate elements.
prompt.exact_main_title: 治理底座决定哪些节点必须人工接管
prompt.content_structure: Create a full-page governance board. Center shield labeled 治理底座. Four large checklist cards around it: 证据来源, 风险分级, 人机门控, 审计指标. Three agent lanes feed into the shield: 诊疗, 科研, 流程. Use one red handwritten banner: 高风险节点必须人工接管.

prompt.exact_main_title: 平台负责复制, 专病负责落地
prompt.content_structure: Make a full-slide closing page with one big hand-drawn bridge. Left pillar: 肠癌验证能力. Middle bridge: 平台沉淀共性. Right pillar: 专病规则包落地. Add one forward arrow to 下一章: AI 原生医疗生态. Keep the page confident, sparse, and memorable.
